title: Work Doc Image Header: Should be able to customize with images from account library
excerpt: Should be able to attach company images for a work doc header. The images provided are not relevant to my team.

posts.author: sswale (Sandra Swale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Work Doc Header Image21005×324 106 KB

Should be able to attach company images for a work doc header. The images provided are not relevant to my team.

posts.author: DarrenFinnigan (Darren Finnigan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Its shocking that this isn’t already a feature. Why would we want generic images at the top of our Docs? You can already add images to forms, why wouldn’t that feature be here too.

Please add this in, Monday!

posts.author: EricDuncan (Eric Kozak)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a surprising and silly limitation. Boooooooo. Def upvoting this.

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
While this is definitely not a high priority feature for me, I am still baffled that this is not possible.

Especially when working together with clients in projects, small things like these can make a difference.
It helps our team to appear more professionally and also affects the way the client experiences the software.

Features like these are an easy win/win for users and Monday.com

posts.author: MorSha (Mor)
posts.cookedHtml: I was searching for this option also, keeping on company’s format it is important in most of the company I work with… please add

posts.author: Frik (Frik van Coppenhagen)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed. I haven’t used this feature because the way it works currently, it would not be adding any value to company data/info/docs.
